summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Kkemi Design Studio portfolio website. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend UI working correctly with successful form submission and navigation.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (/api/) returns correct message
Backend contact form submission (POST /api/contact) works with form data
Backend contact form submission with file upload works correctly
Backend GET contact submissions retrieves data correctly
Frontend loads correctly showing hero section with 'We design what you imagine'
Navigation bar displays all 5 sections: Studio, Services, Portfolio, Occasions, Contact
Language switcher works: EN, EL, RU buttons visible, clickable, content changes
OPEN/CLOSED status badge shows correctly ('OPENS THURSDAY AT 09:00')
Navigation to different sections using nav links works smoothly
Services section renders with 6+ service cards/elements
Portfolio section renders with portfolio content and images
Contact form renders with all required fields: name, email, phone, service dropdown, message, file upload, submit button
Contact form submission works successfully with 'Message sent successfully!' confirmation
Mobile menu toggle functionality works correctly
Footer contains contact information and social links
Working hours display correctly in contact section
